ingredients.item: ¼ cup (60 ml) plus 3 tablespoons vegetable oil, divided
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (60 ml) plus 3 tablespoons vegetable oil, divided

ingredients.item: 1 block (14 ounces/400 g) firm tofu
ingredients.original: 1 block (14 ounces/400 g) firm tofu

ingredients.item: 1 ounce (28 g) dried bean curd sheet, soaked and cut into 4-inch (10 cm) squares (optional)
ingredients.original: 1 ounce (28 g) dried bean curd sheet, soaked and cut into 4-inch (10 cm) squares (optional)

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon minced leek (white part only)
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon minced leek (white part only)

ingredients.item: 7 ounces (200 g) fresh mushrooms (enoki, oyster, white beech, or similar), stems trimmed and separated
ingredients.original: 7 ounces (200 g) fresh mushrooms (enoki, oyster, white beech, or similar), stems trimmed and separated

ingredients.item: ¾ ounce (20 g) dried wood ear mushrooms, soaked and thinly sliced
ingredients.original: ¾ ounce (20 g) dried wood ear mushrooms, soaked and thinly sliced

ingredients.item: ¾ ounce (20 g) dried shiitake mushrooms, soaked and thinly sliced
ingredients.original: ¾ ounce (20 g) dried shiitake mushrooms, soaked and thinly sliced

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon soy sauce, plus more to taste if needed
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon soy sauce, plus more to taste if needed

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon vegetarian oyster sauce
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon vegetarian oyster sauce

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder

ingredients.item: 10 ounces (283 g) dried flat rice noodles or 21 ounces (600 g) fresh mì Quảng or flat rice noodles
ingredients.original: 10 ounces (283 g) dried flat rice noodles or 21 ounces (600 g) fresh mì Quảng or flat rice noodles

ingredients.item: 3½ ounces (100 g) mung bean sprouts
ingredients.original: 3½ ounces (100 g) mung bean sprouts

ingredients.item: 3½ ounces (100 g) green cabbage, shredded
ingredients.original: 3½ ounces (100 g) green cabbage, shredded

ingredients.item: 1 ounce (28 g) round leaf mint or mint, roughly chopped if leaves are large
ingredients.original: 1 ounce (28 g) round leaf mint or mint, roughly chopped if leaves are large

ingredients.item: 10 perilla leaves, chopped
ingredients.original: 10 perilla leaves, chopped

ingredients.item: 1 green chili pepper (serrano or jalapeño), sliced
ingredients.original: 1 green chili pepper (serrano or jalapeño), sliced

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons crushed roasted peanuts, for garnish
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons crushed roasted peanuts, for garnish

ingredients.item: 1. Heat ¼ cup (60 ml) of the oil in a small saucepan over medium-low heat. When hot, add the tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides (10 to 15 minutes). Transfer to a cooling rack or paper towel–lined plate to drain. When cool, cut into bite-size pieces.
ingredients.original: 1. Heat ¼ cup (60 ml) of the oil in a small saucepan over medium-low heat. When hot, add the tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides (10 to 15 minutes). Transfer to a cooling rack or paper towel–lined plate to drain. When cool, cut into bite-size pieces.

ingredients.item: 2. Drop the dried bean curd (if using) into the remaining oil, cook until they puff up (5 to 10 seconds), and then immediately remove from oil with tongs and place on a cooling rack to drain excess oil.
ingredients.original: 2. Drop the dried bean curd (if using) into the remaining oil, cook until they puff up (5 to 10 seconds), and then immediately remove from oil with tongs and place on a cooling rack to drain excess oil.

ingredients.item: 3. In a large skillet, heat remaining 3 tablespoons vegetable oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add leek and cook and stir until slightly golden (about 1 minute). Transfer half of the fried leek oil to a small bowl and reserve for later.
ingredients.original: 3. In a large skillet, heat remaining 3 tablespoons vegetable oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add leek and cook and stir until slightly golden (about 1 minute). Transfer half of the fried leek oil to a small bowl and reserve for later.

ingredients.item: 4. Add all mushrooms, soy sauce, vegetarian oyster sauce, stock powder, and sugar to the remaining oil in the skillet. Cook and stir until mushrooms are tender and browned (4 to 5 minutes), and then add tofu. Cook and stir for about 30 seconds, and then remove pan from heat and set aside to cool.
ingredients.original: 4. Add all mushrooms, soy sauce, vegetarian oyster sauce, stock powder, and sugar to the remaining oil in the skillet. Cook and stir until mushrooms are tender and browned (4 to 5 minutes), and then add tofu. Cook and stir for about 30 seconds, and then remove pan from heat and set aside to cool.

ingredients.item: 5. Follow the directions on the package to cook the dried flat rice noodles.
ingredients.original: 5. Follow the directions on the package to cook the dried flat rice noodles.

ingredients.item: 6. In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles with cooked mushrooms and tofu, along with juices from the skillet. Add the bean sprouts, cabbage, mint, perilla leaves, chili pepper, and reserved leek oil. Mix well and add more soy sauce to taste if needed.
ingredients.original: 6. In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles with cooked mushrooms and tofu, along with juices from the skillet. Add the bean sprouts, cabbage, mint, perilla leaves, chili pepper, and reserved leek oil. Mix well and add more soy sauce to taste if needed.

ingredients.item: 7. Transfer salad to a platter, garnish with peanuts and fried bean curd (if using), and serve.
ingredients.original: 7. Transfer salad to a platter, garnish with peanuts and fried bean curd (if using), and serve.
